description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a streamlined blue fuselage and a high-mounted straight wing configuration. The aircraft features a two-blade propeller at the nose, a tricycle landing gear setup with two main wheels and a nose wheel, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with dark-tinted windows, suggesting a single or dual-seat arrangement. The wings are straight with slight dihedral and have visible ailerons, while the tail section is compact and tapers smoothly. The overall design is reminiscent of light general aviation aircraft commonly seen at small airports or in private hangars.
description: A compact, blue, single-engine airplane with a high-mounted straight wing, tricycle landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-mounted straight wings, nose-mounted propeller, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit windows, and the main and nose landing gear.
description_view_2: Head-on view emphasizing the propeller, cockpit, and symmetrical wing structure.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the tail section, wing dihedral, and landing gear arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with dark-tinted windows, likely single or dual-seat.
